title: tengine.race.episode v1
description: A completed recorded run (human, AI brain, or scripted) on a track instance — the bus-worthy INDEX + summary of a training episode. Source: /tengine/race. The dense per-tick samples are NOT inlined here; they live in `trajectory_artifact` (artifact store) and follow the `$defs.sample` shape. Emit one of these per run; downstream imitation/FunSearch training consumes the artifact, while the bus carries the searchable metadata. Keep this event small — never inline 60 Hz trajectories (see the redis-mirror _raw size constraint).

episode_id.description: ULID identifying this episode; referenced by tengine.race.event and by trained brains' source_episodes.

track_id.description: Track or generated-instance identifier this run was driven on.

track_seed.description: Deterministic instance seed, when the track was procedurally generated — required to reproduce the exact track for offline rollouts/eval.

pilot_kind.description: Who drove: a human (imitation source), a distilled brain (closed-loop telemetry), or a scripted baseline.

pilot_id.description: Human handle or brain_id (see tengine.race.brain) of the pilot.

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp at which the run began.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the run in milliseconds.

lap_time_ms.description: Best (or total, see laps) lap time in milliseconds — a primary fitness signal for racing-line evolution.

laps.description: Number of laps completed in this episode.

sample_rate_hz.description: Sampling rate (Hz) of the per-tick records in trajectory_artifact.

trajectory_artifact.description: URI (file:// or artifact-store path) of the dense per-tick sample stream for this run, each record shaped like $defs.sample.

sample_schema.description: Identifier of the per-sample record format (default: this schema's #/$defs/sample at v1). Lets the dense format version independently if needed.

summary.description: Aggregate metrics for fast filtering/oracle calibration without reading the artifact (e.g. mean_speed, max_speed, collisions, off_track_ms, mean_line_deviation, boost_uses).

engine_build.description: tengine build/commit that produced the run — guards against training across incompatible physics.

$defs_note.description: Informational: the dense sample format is defined under $defs.sample of this schema.

sample.description: One per-tick record in the trajectory_artifact. Documents the dense format even though it is stored externally, so capture and training agree on the contract.

steer.description: Steering command in [-1,1] (left negative, right positive).

track_u.description: Normalized progress along the track centerline in [0,1].

track_offset.description: Signed lateral offset from the centerline (world units).
